function_catalog_scope: config parsing, built-in task semantics, LoRA/DoRA adapter settings, and run-artifact persistence
NPZ and Kaldi data-backend selection, manifest routing, and storage-hook batch loading
registry and builder entrypoints for backbones, tokenizers, projections, and CLS handling
runtime entrypoints for pretrain, adapt, finetune, and inference
checkpoint initialization, averaging, distributed helpers, result CSV writes, prediction CSV writes, inference run manifests, and inference W&B artifacts
core backbone, downstream, LoRA separate-adapter trainability, AHI-eval, layer-mix, and adaptation-freeze contracts
standalone sleep2vec2, sleep2vec_hires, and sleep2expert variant surfaces, including RoFormer parity and package-local data/preprocess mirrors
sleep2expert MoE config, routing, finetune tuning, checkpoint initialization, regularization, and routing export
dataset, metadata, sampler, and missing-channel batching contracts
preset generation, split assignment, mask normalization, and WatchPAT conversion CLIs
standalone UKB/asleep night cutting, UKB annotation parsing, UKB demographic collection, Kaldi index repair, and case-control matching utilities
downstream evaluation metrics including specificity, downstream evaluation plots, pair-accuracy heatmaps, and diagnostics hooks
workflow_scope: infer, checkpoint averaging, and prediction export
preprocessing, preset generation, and standalone data utilities
config validation and example recipe coverage
variant namespaces and sleep2expert routing analysis

exclusions: AGENTS.md is referenced for ownership context but not duplicated here
preprocess/preprocess_pipeline.ipynb is summarized only at workflow level
sleep2vec2/preprocess/preprocess_pipeline.ipynb, sleep2vec_hires/preprocess/preprocess_pipeline.ipynb, and sleep2expert/preprocess/preprocess_pipeline.ipynb are summarized only at workflow level
sleep2vec_moe/ has no tracked files on this branch
egs/ contains tracked example data scaffolding but is outside this branch-index coverage scope
tracked visualization font binaries are noted at directory level, not indexed function-by-function
__pycache__, .DS_Store, and ignored local artifacts are excluded
untracked workspaces such as index/ and new_index/ are excluded
sleep2vec_hires/ was seeded from sleep2vec2/ after the last full index refresh
